name: Great Compassion Dharani
purpose: purification, protection, healing, liberation of all beings
text_sanskrit: Namo Ratna Trayāya. Namo Āryāvalokiteśvarāya Bodhisattvāya Mahāsattvāya Mahākāruṇikāya. Oṃ Sarva-bhaya-śodhanāya Tasya Namaskṛtvā Imām Āryāvalokiteśvara-stavanaṃ Nīlakaṇṭha-nāma. Hṛdayaṃ Vartayiṣyāmi Sarvārtha-sādhanaṃ Śubhaṃ Ajeyaṃ Sarva-bhūtānāṃ Bhava-mārga-viśodhakam.
text_chinese: 南無喝囉怛那哆囉夜耶。南無阿唎耶。婆盧羯帝爍缽囉耶。菩提薩埵婆耶。摩訶薩埵婆耶。摩訶迦盧尼迦耶。唵。薩皤囉罰曳。數怛那怛寫。南無悉吉埵伊蒙阿唎耶。婆盧吉帝室佛囉楞馱婆。南無那囉謹墀。醯唎摩訶皤哆沙咩。薩婆阿他豆輸朋。阿逝孕。薩婆薩哆那摩婆薩多那摩婆伽。摩罰特豆。怛姪他。唵阿婆盧醯。盧迦帝。迦羅帝。夷醯唎。摩訶菩提薩埵。薩婆薩婆。摩囉摩囉。摩醯摩醯唎馱孕。俱盧俱盧羯蒙。度盧度盧罰闍耶帝。摩訶罰闍耶帝。陀囉陀囉。地唎尼。室佛囉耶。遮囉遮囉。麼麼罰摩囉。穆帝隸。伊醯伊醯。室那室那。阿囉嘇佛囉舍利。罰沙罰嘇。佛囉舍耶。呼嚧呼嚧摩囉。呼嚧呼嚧醯利。娑囉娑囉。悉唎悉唎。蘇嚧蘇嚧。菩提夜菩提夜。菩馱夜菩馱夜。彌帝唎夜。那囉謹墀。地利瑟尼那。婆夜摩那。娑婆訶。悉陀夜。娑婆訶。摩訶悉陀夜。娑婆訶。

name: Ushnisha Vijaya Dharani
chinese: 佛頂尊勝陀羅尼 (Fódǐng Zūnshèng Tuóluóní)
purpose: purification of karma, liberation from lower realms, longevity, protection
text_sanskrit: Namo Bhagavate Trailokya Prativiśiṣṭāya Buddhāya. Tadyathā: Oṃ Viśodhaya Viśodhaya. Asama-sama Samantāvabhāsa-spharaṇa Gati Gahana Svabhāva Viśuddhe. Abhiṣiñcatu Mām. Sugata Vara Vacana Amṛta Abhiṣekai Mahā-mantra-padai. Āhara Āhara Āyuḥ-sandhāraṇi. Śodhaya Śodhaya Gagana Viśuddhe. Uṣṇīṣa Vijaya Viśuddhe. Sahasra-raśmi Sañcodite. Sarva Tathāgata Avalokani Ṣaṭ-pāramitā-paripūraṇi. Sarva Tathāgata Mātite Daśa-bhūmi Pratiṣṭhite. Sarva Tathāgata Hṛdaya Adhiṣṭhāna Adhiṣṭhite. Mudre Mudre Mahā-mudre Vajra-kāya Saṃhatana Viśuddhe. Sarva Karma Āvaraṇa Viśuddhe. Prati-nivartaya Āyur me Viśuddhe. Samaya Adhiṣṭhite. Maṇi Maṇi Mahā-maṇi. Tathātā Bhūta-koṭi Pariśuddhe. Visphuṭa Buddhi Śuddhe. Jaya Jaya Vijaya Vijaya. Smara Smara Sarva Buddha Adhiṣṭhita Śuddhe. Vajri Vajra-garbhe Vajraṃ Bhavatu Mama Śarīram. Sarva Sattvānāṃ ca Kāya Pariśuddhe. Sarva Gati Pariśuddhe. Sarva Tathāgata Sama-śvāsa Adhiṣṭhite. Sarva Tathāgata Samāśvāsādhiṣṭhite. Budhya Budhya. Vibudhya Vibudhya. Bodhaya Bodhaya. Vibodhaya Vibodhaya. Samanta Pariśuddhe. Sarva Tathāgata Hṛdayā Adhiṣṭhānādhiṣṭhita Mahā-mudre Svāhā.

name: Vajrasattva Hundred-Syllable Mantra
chinese: 金剛薩埵百字明 (Jīngāng Sàduǒ Bǎizì Míng)
purpose: purification of all negative karma, confession, restoring broken samaya
text_sanskrit: Oṃ Vajrasattva Samayam Anupālaya Vajrasattva Tvenopatiṣṭha Dṛḍho Me Bhava Sutoṣyo Me Bhava Supoṣyo Me Bhava Anurakto Me Bhava Sarva Siddhiṃ Me Prayaccha Sarva Karmasu Ca Me Cittaṃ Śreyaḥ Kuru Hūṃ Ha Ha Ha Ha Hoḥ Bhagavan Sarva Tathāgata Vajra Mā Me Muñca Vajrī Bhava Mahā-samaya Sattva Āḥ Hūṃ Phaṭ Svāhā.

name: Cundi Dharani
text_sanskrit: Namaḥ Saptānāṃ Samyak-saṃbuddha Koṭīnāṃ. Tadyathā: Oṃ Cale Cule Cundī Svāhā.
text_chinese: 南無颯哆喃 三藐三勃陀 俱胝喃 怛姪他 唵 折隸 主隸 準提 娑婆訶

name: Shurangama Mantra (Opening)
purpose: protection from all obstacles, destroying negative forces, establishing samadhi
text_chinese: 南無薩怛他 蘇伽多耶 阿囉訶帝 三藐三菩陀寫 南無薩怛他 佛陀俱胝瑟尼釤 南無薩婆 勃陀勃地 薩跢鞞弊 南無薩多南 三藐三菩陀 俱知南 娑舍囉婆迦 僧伽喃 南無盧雞阿羅漢跢喃 南無蘇盧多波那喃 南無娑羯唎陀伽彌喃 南無盧雞三藐伽跢喃 三藐伽波囉 底波多那喃
text_sanskrit: Namaḥ Sarva-tathāgatāya Sugatāya Arhate Samyak-saṃbuddhāya. Namaḥ Sarva-buddha-koṭi-uṣṇīṣebhyaḥ. Namaḥ Sarva-bodhisattvebhyaḥ Mahāsattvebhyaḥ.

name: Medicine Buddha Dharani
chinese: 藥師灌頂真言 (Yàoshī Guàndǐng Zhēnyán)
purpose: healing all illness, dispelling obstacles, increasing wisdom
text_sanskrit: Namo Bhagavate Bhaiṣajyaguru Vaiḍūryaprabha-rājāya Tathāgatāya Arhate Samyak-saṃbuddhāya. Tadyathā: Oṃ Bhaiṣajye Bhaiṣajye Mahā-bhaiṣajye Bhaiṣajya-rāje Samudgate Svāhā.
text_chinese: 南無薄伽伐帝 鞞殺社 窶嚕薜琉璃 鉢喇婆 喝囉闍也 怛他揭多耶 阿囉訶諦 三藐三勃陀耶 怛姪他 唵 鞞殺逝 鞞殺逝 鞞殺社 三沒揭諦 莎訶

name: Green Tara Dharani
purpose: swift protection, removing fears, accomplishing all activities
text_chinese: 唵 達咧 都達咧 都咧 莎哈

name: Guru Rinpoche Vajra Guru Mantra
purpose: overcoming obstacles, protection in degenerate times, spiritual accomplishments
text_sanskrit: Oṃ Āḥ Hūṃ Vajra Guru Padma Siddhi Hūṃ.
text_chinese: 嗡 阿 吽 班雜 咕嚕 貝瑪 悉地 吽

name: Heart Sutra Mantra (Prajnaparamita)
chinese: 般若波羅蜜多心經咒 (Bōrě Xīnjīng Zhòu)
purpose: transcending all suffering, realizing emptiness, ultimate wisdom
text_sanskrit: Tadyathā: Gate Gate Pāragate Pārasaṃgate Bodhi Svāhā.
text_chinese: 揭諦 揭諦 波羅揭諦 波羅僧揭諦 菩提 薩婆訶

name: Amitabha Rebirth Dharani
purpose: purification of karma, rebirth in Sukhavati, liberation of the deceased
text_sanskrit: Namo Amitābhāya Tathāgatāya. Tadyathā: Oṃ Amṛte Amṛtod-bhave Amṛta-sambhave Amṛta-garbhe Amṛta-siddhe Amṛta-teje Amṛta-vikrānte Amṛta-vikrānta-gāmine Amṛta-gagana-kīrti-kare Amṛta-dundubhi-svare Sarvārtha-sādhane Sarva-karma-kleśa-kṣayaṃ-kare Svāhā.
text_chinese: 南無阿彌多婆夜 哆他伽多夜 哆地夜他 阿彌利都婆毗 阿彌利哆 悉耽婆毗 阿彌唎哆 毗迦蘭帝 阿彌唎哆 毗迦蘭多 伽彌膩 伽伽那 枳多迦利 莎婆訶

name: Manjushri Wisdom Dharani
chinese: 文殊菩薩心咒 (Wénshū Púsà Xīnzhòu)
text_sanskrit: Oṃ A Ra Pa Ca Na Dhīḥ.
text_chinese: 嗡 阿 惹 巴 扎 那 諦

name: Prajnaparamita in One Letter
purpose: condensed wisdom, the essence of all Prajnaparamita sutras in one syllable
